epics.title: Deploy Full Agent Team to VM
epics.description: Deploy all agent workspaces, cron jobs, and daily automation to the VM. This is the foundation for everything else.

epics.title: First Revenue Project
epics.description: Research, identify, and build the first revenue-generating project. Bootstrap on free resources.

epics.title: Platform Security Hardening
epics.description: Continuous security improvement across all infrastructure, code, and agent workspaces.

tickets.title: Set up 24/7 monitoring for all services
tickets.description: Deploy Monitoring Agent to continuously check gateway, voice bot, disk, memory, CPU, ports, logs, and SSL certs every 5 minutes.

tickets.title: Deploy Kanban web dashboard
tickets.description: Set up the Kanban board web dashboard with GitHub Pages hosting. Fix nested directory issue.

tickets.title: Deploy all agent workspaces to VM
tickets.description: Run all setup scripts: setup-agent-team.sh, setup-audit-team.sh, setup-research-agent.sh, setup-business-division.sh, setup-monitoring.sh, setup-org-excellence.sh

tickets.title: Set up daily automated cron jobs on VM
tickets.description: Install all cron jobs: monitoring (5min), org-review (6am), research (7am), audit (8am), finance (9am), improvement (10am), data (11am), backup (11pm)

tickets.title: Identify first revenue-generating project
tickets.description: Research and identify the first project to build for revenue. Use Research Agent → Business Analyst → pick opportunity → Orchestrator builds MVP.

tickets.title: Agent Request: ML Engineer needed
tickets.description: Data Engineer is overloaded with ML/AI pipeline work. Need dedicated ML Engineer agent to handle model training, inference, and AI feature development.
